steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content: A linear function with slope $m$ and y-intercept $b$ has the form $f(x)=mx+b$. Since $(0,7)$ is on the graph, $b=7$.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $\dfrac{1}{3}x+7$ — $f(0)=7$. Matches the given point.
  • B) $\dfrac{1}{3}x+\dfrac{1}{7}$ — $f(0)=\dfrac{1}{7} e 7$. Eliminate.
  • C) $\dfrac{1}{3}x-\dfrac{7}{3}$ — $f(0)=-\dfrac{7}{3} e 7$. Eliminate.
  • D) $\dfrac{1}{3}x-7$ — $f(0)=-7 e 7$. Eliminate.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
